title: Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)
content:

**[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] *2 [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yachts 3000]] **[[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] **''[[Jade's Fire]]'' *New Republic **[[Corvette/Legends|Corvettes]] **[[Troop transport/Legends|Troop transports]] *[[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighters]] **[[X-TIE Fighter]]s **[[Corellian/B-wing Ugly|Corellian/B-wing Uglies]] **[[Heavy/Light Attack Fighter 500|HLAF-500 starfighters]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*''Intruder'' destroyed **Gaeriel Captison **Admiral Ossilege *''Sentinel'' and ''Defender'' damaged *Few starfighters destroyed |casual2=Almost total |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|We have two objectives, neither of them very easy. First is to defeat the Triad fleet and prevent it from dominating this star system. Second is to do whatever we can to prevent Centerpoint from firing again.|[[Belindi Kalenda]]|}} The '''Battle of Centerpoint Station''', also known as '''Operation Sidestep''', was a battle for the control of [[Centerpoint Station]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] and the climax of the [[Corellian Crisis]]. It resulted in the defeat of the [[Sacorrian Triad]]'s separatist force and the return of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fold. ==Prelude== {{Quote|That is an eighty-ship fleet out there, after all. They could dominate this star system indefinitely, if they chose to do so, and we left them alone. Or suppose, for example, they got to the repulsors on Drall and Selonia and grabbed them from us before we were ready to use them?|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hortel Ossilege]]|}} In the late [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Sacorrian Triad]], the authoritarian government that ruled [[Sacorria]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], designed a strategy to destabilize the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] and take control of the entire sector from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. They captured [[Centerpoint Station]], a mysterious and ancient [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in the Corellian system and used to destroy several stars, including [[Thanta Zilbra (star)|Thanta Zilbra]], which caused the deaths of tens of thousands. The New Republic was virtually powerless to intervene as the Triad also used Centerpoint to generate a huge [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]] and [[Jammer/Legends|communications jamming]] over the entire Corellian system. Moreover, the majority of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] was undergoing repairs following the recent [[Imperial Skirmishes]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[File:CenterpointStation.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Centerpoint Station]] While [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], the commander of the New Republic Defense Fleet, prepared what ships he could, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] obtained the assistance of the [[Bakuran Defense Fleet]]. The [[Bakuran]]s had developed a technology able to counteract interdiction fields named [[hyperwave inertial momentum sustainer]] (HIMS) that could be used to penetrate the Corellian system. The hastily-assembled Bakuran task force consisted of the [[Bakura-class destroyer|''Bakura''-class destroyers]] ''[[Watchkeeper]]'', [[Defender (Bakura-class)|''Defender'']] and [[Sentinel (Bakura-class)|''Sentinel'']], and the [[Namana-class light cruiser|''Namana''-class light cruiser]] [[Intruder (Namana-class)|''Intruder'']], all equipped with HIMS technology, along with an accompaniment of [[General Purpose Attack Fighter]]s. The fleet was commanded by Bakuran Defense Fleet Admiral [[Hortel Ossilege]] and former [[Prime Minister (Bakura)|Prime Minister]] of Bakura [[Gaeriel Captison]].
[[File:Watchkeeper1.jpg|thumb|left|220px|The ''Watchkeeper'' is flattened by Selonia's repulsorlift.]]
The use of HIMS technology allowed the Bakuran fleet to penetrate the Corellian interdiction field. Upon arriving in the Corellian system, the New Republic forces headed to [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]] in order to conceal their veritable target: Centerpoint Station. On the way, they were attacked by [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] of the [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] [[Overden]]. The Selonians attempted to annihilate the Bakuran vessels using their [[planetary repulsor]] but they only destroyed the badly damaged ''Watchkeeper''. The New Republic fleet later headed to Centerpoint Station. The Bakuran vessels were placed into orbit around the station to permit a scout group to land aboard Centerpoint and explore the station. There, they discovered that Centerpoint Station was in fact the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] that destroyed [[Thanta Zilbra (planet)|Thanta Zilbra]]. Unfortunately, they were not able to stop the countdown of Centerpoint's next shot, aimed at [[Bovo Yagen (star)|Bovo Yagen]] whose star system had an estimated twelve million inhabitants, that was planned for a few hours later. A short time later, [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], the leader of the [[Human League]], betrayed the Sacorrian Triad and deactivated remotely Centerpoint's interdiction field and communications jamming. Thrackan, who had been working with the Sacorrians, had struck out on his own, hoping to take Centerpoint for himself and become the new [[Diktat]] of Corellia. The Triad was forced to intervene and sent its massive starfleet in the Corellian system to take control of the system. But the Triad had to deal with the small New Republic fleet first. ==The battle== {{Quote|I don't even know why you were so eager to have my fleet come here. There was hardly any work left for my ships to do-thanks to Admiral Ossilege and Gaeriel Captison.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]|}} The Sacorrian fleet consisted of 80 starships, excluding carried starfighters, while the New Republic fleet only counted three [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] and their auxiliaries. Although the Sacorrian vessels were quite ancient and poorly maintained, the Bakurans did not expect to be able to defeat such a large force. Admiral Ossilege decided to attack the Triad and use the advantage of their superior technology and crew to hold off the Sacorrian Triad forces until the arrival of Ackbar's New Republic fleet. Ossilege hoped to be able to stand long enough to permit his engineers to use the planetary repulsor on [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] against Centerpoint to prevent its next shot. [[File:The_Corellian_Trilogy.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Anakin Solo at Centerpoint Station.]] The Bakuran task force attacked first to surprise its enemy. Ossilege's vessels performed a precision minimum-distance hyperspace jump straight into the thick of the Triad fleet. Then, each Bakuran capital ship charged the enemy formation through an assigned lane. Ossilege's plan was to drive through the enemy ships toward the rear, keeping up a series of running engagements, intended to cause disruption as much as damage. The tactic was successful and the Bakuran forces ravaged the enemy fleet with only minor damage. However, at a key turning point, a group of Sacorrian [[robot ramship]]s [[Ramming/Legends|rammed]] and critically damaged the Bakuran [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''Intruder''. Since Hortel Ossilege and Gaeriel Captison were deadly wounded, they chose to initiate the autodestruct sequence of the ''Intruder'' in the midst of the Sacorrian fleet. The subsequent explosion devastated the Triad fleet. In the midst of the space battle, the countdown to the next shot from Centerpoint, aimed at Bovo Yagen, was only minutes away. [[Antone]] and other new Republic technicians desperately worked at the controls of the planetary repulsor on Drall to nudge Centerpoint and prevent the shot. Finally, young [[Anakin Solo]] drew upon the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and succeeded in deflecting Centerpoint, thereby saving Bovo Yagen. The Battle of Centerpoint eventually ended when Admiral Ackbar's forces arrived in the Corellian system. The New Republic was easily able to overwhelm the remaining Sacorrian defenders and ensure control of Centerpoint. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|No one wins a war. There are just different degrees of losing. The damage done on these worlds is shocking. Shocking. It will take them many years to rebuild it all, to sort out all the loose ends.|Admiral Ackbar|}} With the defeat of the Sacorrian Triad fleet, the New Republic was able to restore its authority over the Corellian sector. A pro-New Republic government was installed in the system, led by a native, [[Marcha]], [[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] of [[Mastigophorous]], who was widely accepted by the Corellian population. Nevertheless, the relationship between the New Republic and the Corellians remained difficult.''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Despite their crimes, the Sacorrian Triad remained in power on Sacorria''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' and would became over time a model for secessionist Corellians.''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' After the conclusion of the Corellian Crisis, Centerpoint Station was kept under the tight control of the new Corellian government, which was allied with the New Republic.{{SW|url=news/the-world-puller-the-history-of-centerpoint-station-needs-author-entry|text=Galactic Architecture 101 and the History of Centerpoint Station|int=Galactic Architecture 101 and the History of Centerpoint Station|nolive=1}} The station would again be used as a weapon during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], after the rise to power on Corellia of Thrackan Sal-Solo's secessionist [[Centerpoint Party]]. In the following years, Sal-Solo managed to place the station within its firm control and eventually exploited it to declare again the independence of the Corellian system, therefore starting the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' {{ID|Operation Sidestep" and "Centerpoint Battle}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *{{FactFile|101|INS 1-2|The Corellian Insurrection}} *{{FactFile|112|RAM 1-2|Robot Ramships}} *{{FactFile|113|NAV 1-2|Naval Tactics}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|gaerielcaptison|Captison, Gaeriel}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *{{SW|url=news/the-world-puller-the-history-of-centerpoint-station-needs-author-entry|text=Galactic Architecture 101 and the History of Centerpoint Station|int=Galactic Architecture 101 and the History of Centerpoint Station|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 18 ABY}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de la Estación Centralia (Crisis Corelliana) |uk=Битва біля станції «ЦентроТочка» }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis), Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Centerpoint Station]] [[Category:Battles of the Corellian Crisis]] [[Category:Culture of Bakura]]
